thesis_hint: Explore a new concept this cycle. Recent journal balance is close to acceptable overall, but concentration rules still require rotation: 1h work dominates 6 of the last 10 entries, and the last 4 entries were all 4h continuation/reclaim exploration batches. Rotate away from both lanes at once. Target INJ 2h and demand 3 materially different specs around negative-funding directional acceptance: one anchored-VWAP value-acceptance breakout, one compression-release breakout-hold, and one base-break confirmation / expansion variant. Do not write another reclaim, snapback fade, ETH failed-continuation clone, or 4h staircase continuation. The question this cycle is whether a mid-speed 2h market with real crowding rewards acceptance-and-expansion better than reversal or pullback-reclaim logic.
stop_condition: Stop the batch when either (A) one spec reaches walk-forward QScore >= 1.0 with profit_factor >= 1.12, total_trades >= 18, and max_drawdown_pct <= 9.0, or (B) 4 materially different specs are exhausted without a pass. Abort any spec with total_trades < 12, profit_factor < 1.02, or trending regime profit_factor < 1.00.
rotation_reason: Force exploration: only ETH channel has a valid walk-forward pass, but recent history is over-concentrated in 1h exploit work and 4h continuation/reclaim batches, so this cycle rotates to a fresh 2h concept instead of more refinement.
